name: Peanut Butter Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp liquid honey or corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the corn flake crumbs, coconut, peanut butter, and honey in a bowl.
2. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Scoop out 2 teaspoon portions of the mixture.
4. Shape each portion into a ball.
5. Roll the balls in remaining crushed corn flakes.
6. Chill until firm.
7. Store in a covered container in the refrigerator.
18 nuggets, serving size 1 nugget
Nutritional Information: 1/2 fruit & veg choice, 1 fat & oils choice
- 5g carbohydrate
- 2g protein
- 4g fat
- 64 calories
Source: Choice Cooking, Canadian Diabetes Association. Shared by Elizabeth Rodier, 6/93
